description_long: This bungalow features a single-story structure with a green gabled roof and a prominent brick facade. The front includes a covered porch area with wooden railings and posts, partially enclosed by a screen, and a visible hot tub and outdoor seating. The exterior walls are primarily constructed of red brick, with wood paneling and latticework details on the porch. Large glass sliding doors and windows provide ample natural light and a view into the living space. The rear of the bungalow is fully enclosed with brick, while the sides show additional porch space and seating. The overall design is compact, functional, and suited for residential neighborhoods or park settings.
description: A single-story brick bungalow with a green gabled roof, covered porch, and large glass doors, featuring a hot tub and outdoor seating.
description_view_0: Front view showing the brick facade, covered porch with wooden posts, large glass doors, and a hot tub.
description_view_1: Side angle highlighting the gabled roof, open porch area, hot tub, and outdoor furniture.
description_view_2: Rear view with a mostly brick wall, side porch, and additional seating visible.
description_view_3: Back view displaying the solid brick wall and the gabled roof structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front windows and sliding glass doors
